props.name: calloutVariant
props.description: Sets the context and colour of the callout modal. Required when used as a callout type.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Set the max allowed width of the modal.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls if the modal is visible or not.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: transition
props.description: Sets the animation transition when opening/closing. 'fast' or 'slow' for animated, 'none' for instant.

events.name: onClose
events.description: Callback fired when the modal is closed. When provided, enables the close button and backdrop click-to-close behavior.

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Content rendered in the modal's actions slot, typically action buttons.

slots.name: heading
slots.description: The heading text displayed at the top of the modal.
